headline: Americans Still Can't Afford to Buy — and Homebuilder Stocks Are Paying the Price
summary: A BofA Securities analyst says that Homebuilder stocks lagged the broader market in the first half of 2026, according to the firm’s midyear report. The S&P Composite 1500 Homebuilding Index gained about 6% through June 30, trailing the 9% advance...
